title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at Expeditors India

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at Expeditors India
jsonLd.description:
Expeditors India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Logistics Manager at our Mumbai location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Expeditors India:
Expeditors India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Expeditors India!
